titleStmt.title: SII 38.540: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 540. (A.R. No. 540 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravartti Vīrarājēndrachōḷa Year 12: Mēsha, śu. di. 13 (mistake for śu. 7). Monday, Puṇarpūśam = 1256 A.D. April 3.

summary.p: This inscription records that a gift of a māḍai by uḍaiyāṉ Vaḍuganāthan Mārippiḷḷai alias Arumārisādaṉ a resident of Pulippākkam alias Silachintāmaṇichaturvēdimaṅgalam (a sub-division) of Āmūr-kōṭṭam for burning a twilight lamp to the god (emberumāṉ) at Tirunīrmalai. It is also stated that Tirunīrmalainambi Āṇḍabirāṉ Kēśava Bhaṭṭaṉ (a priest of the temple) received the gift and agreed to burn the lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrarācentira coḻatevaṟku
yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu trayodaśiyum tiṅkaṭ ki
ḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattiṉāḷ tirunīrmalai Emperumāṉukku Āmuṟ ko
ṭṭattu pulippākkamāṉa cilacintāmaṇicaturvetimaṅkalattu pulippākka mu
ṭaiyāṉ vaṭukanātan mārippiḷḷaiyāṉa Arumāritātaṉeṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku 1 I
c cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukkum Ikkoyil naimicai tirunīrmalainampi Āṇṭapirāṉ kecava
paṭṭaṉeṉ kaikkoṇṭa māṭai 1 Immāṭai Oṉṟuṅ koṇṭu Ittiruviḷakku
cantirātittavarai celuttakkaṭaveṉ kecavapaṭṭaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.540 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
